response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and solid software craftsmanship practices, but the resume shows minimal recent Java work and no Kotlin, Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience. The role demands deep JVM expertise and IDE/language-tooling interest, neither of which are demonstrated. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms, mobile orchestration) nearly a decade ago, and there is no evidence of IDE internals work beyond a short C/C++ stint on LabWindows/CVI.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Polyglot experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems
Past C/C++ contribution to an IDE product (NI LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience and very limited recent Java work
No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate ecosystem exposure on the resume
Lacks deep JVM internals or modern language-tooling track record

key_factors.factor: Prior IDE/tooling C/C++ work at NI
